changeSet.author: vvitzilaios
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO tpr_target_period (id, business_id, name, start_date, end_date, performance_data_template_version, performance_data_start_date, performance_data_end_date, buy_out_start_date, buy_out_end_date, is_current) VALUES (nextval('tpr_target_period_seq'), 'TP5', 'TP5 (2021-2022)', '2021-01-01', '2022-12-31', null, '2023-01-01', '2023-05-01', '2023-05-05', '2023-07-01', false);
INSERT INTO tpr_target_period (id, business_id, name, start_date, end_date, performance_data_template_version, performance_data_start_date, performance_data_end_date, buy_out_start_date, buy_out_end_date, is_current) VALUES (nextval('tpr_target_period_seq'), 'TP6', 'TP6 (2024)', '2024-01-01', '2024-12-31', '6.0', '2025-01-01', '2025-05-01', '2025-05-01', '2025-07-01', true);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM tpr_target_period WHERE business_id IN ('TP5', 'TP6');
